title: Frontend Component Decomposition (Phase 3 Inventory Batch)
why: Inventory page.tsx was exceeding 300 LOC, violating architectural constraints and degrading maintainability
root_cause: Inventory page.tsx was exceeding 300 LOC, violating architectural constraints and degrading maintainability
solution: Extracted exportInventoryToExcel utility. Extracted InventoryStatsOverview, InventoryFilterBar, InventoryRollsTable components.
